name: Starvania - Tales Of The Past
short_description: The land of Starvania is under attack by a demon god. It's only way of survival is to summon a warrior from the future to help it fight the demon god. Will it work? Or is Starvania doomed?
detailed_description:
The land of Starvania is under attack by a demon god living in Moronica. The high priest of Starvania decides it's best to defeat the demon with a human from the future. That human is Alisa who is out shopping for a new dress. She is summoned by a spell from the priest and is dropped right into Starvania. Her only way to get back to the present is to go into the land of Moronica and defeat the demon god. Along the way she makes some friends who help her with the journey. Can you help Alisa get back to the present?

Starvania - Tales Of The Past is a single player RPG game. You control Alisa through an open world and encounter other characters who will join your team and help you out as you play.
